answer:
Well, I recently had this really vivid dream where I was on a beach at sunset, and I was just walking along the shore, feeling completely at peace. It was one of those dreams that felt so real, you know? The waves were gently crashing, and everything around me was bathed in this warm golden light. I remember picking up seashells and just feeling this overwhelming sense of happiness. 

I think it might mean that I'm looking for some tranquility in my life, especially with all the stress of applying to universities and deciding what to do next. You know, it's like my mind is telling me to take a break and enjoy the moment, rather than constantly worrying about the future. If I could choose, I'd love for that dream to come true. Just imagine being able to escape to a beautiful beach whenever things get overwhelming! It seems like such a refreshing way to unwind and gain perspective.

But then again, I wonder if living that dream all the time would make it lose its magic, right? I mean, sometimes the beauty of a dream is in how fleeting it is. Still, I find myself yearning for that kind of calmness in my daily life. It feels like a reminder to slow down and appreciate little moments, especially when I'm caught up in the hustle of preparing for this next big chapter. So yeah, I definitely want to hold onto that feeling and maybe find ways to incorporate more peace into my reality.
title: Tell me about a dream you had lately. What do you think it means? Would you want it to come true? Why?
